summary: CV Family & Schooling census — enrichment (~20-field schema, Sonnet workers, 1 site visit + 1 search)
logs: Batch 1: enriching 40 family/schooling entities (Sonnet 4.6, 1 site visit + 1 search)...

enrichment.name: Aleph Schoolhouse

enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Aggregator listings (Winnie, Daycare.com, CareLuLu, Tootris) dominate search results; the school's own site surfaces but authoritative editorial coverage is absent despite apparent community standing as a Jewish early-childhood program.

enrichment.name: Desert Adventist Academy

enrichment.name: The Academy of Palm Desert Community Presbyterian Church

enrichment.name: Dove's Landing School

enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Aggregators (GreatSchools, CDE, PrivateSchoolReview, Movoto) surface the school but with inconsistent address and grade-range data; own site lacks structured data, limiting agent-readable discoverability relative to its award-cited community standing.
